lines.speaker: Marm
lines.text: Hello, human. Are you enjoying your time in Port Roberts.

lines.speaker: Marm
lines.text: Yes, very much so. I find it to be a fun place to take a break and just watch the world go by. There's always ships coming and going and always plenty of people to meet. There's also a lot you can learn here.

lines.speaker: Marm
lines.text: Well, if you haven't already, you should speak to Kellan in the pub. He knows everything there is to know about deep sea trawling.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might just do that. Thanks!
